subcategory : "Email Domain"

# ovh_email_domain_accounts (Data Source)

List email accounts for a given domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_email_domain_accounts" "accounts" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Name of the email domain

### Optional

- `account_name` (String) Filter accounts by name
- `description` (String) Filter accounts by description

### Read-Only

- `accounts` (List of String) List of email account names
